basics.name: Sen Fang
basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate
basics.summary: Ph.D. Candidate at NC State University. I build intelligent systems that automatically detect software vulnerabilities by combining LLMs with program analysis, and investigate LLM security and robustness in code-related tasks.

work.name: Hedra
work.summary: Led development of a petabyte-scale video data processing pipeline, curating millions of high-quality video samples for upstream post-training of generative models (text-to-video, image-to-video). Supervised by Hongwei Yi.

work.name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
work.summary: Developed RepairLLaMA (LoRA-based program repair) and Supersonic (LLM-driven C/C++ optimization), both published in IEEE TSE. Contributed to AI-driven test data generation research. Advisor: Prof. Martin Monperrus.

work.name: Macau University of Science and Technology
work.summary: Led research on learning-based bug report understanding, code clone detection, and pull request automation. Published 5 papers across ICSE, IEEE TSE, IEEE TR, JSS, and IST. Advisor: Prof. Tao Zhang.

courses: Focus: LLM-driven vulnerability detection, AI agents for software security, LLM robustness

education.institution: Central China Normal University, Wuhan, China
